sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25205" key="diama/ransis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαμάρανσις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[μᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n25205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wasting away,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg008:121:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Mete.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">121.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
